F57.evidence: run-sync.ts defaultRebaseContinue/Abort (:130,134) ran execFileSync git rebase --continue/--abort with NO try/catch; a failing rebase (unstaged conflicts/no-rebase/dirty) propagated execFileSync's bare throw uncaught → CLI crash, sync-session.json left stale. FIXED: runRebaseStep wraps both, re-surfacing git's diagnostic as actionable GenericIOError (mirrors defaultPull ISS-032). +1 test.

F58.evidence: run-sync.ts loadSession (:76) JSON.parse(readFileSync) with no try-catch → corrupt sync-session.json crashed every later sync with SyntaxError, unrecoverable without manual delete. saveSession (:82) wrote with bare writeFileSync (no tmp+rename) → interruption corrupts. FIXED: loadSession quarantines to .corrupted.{ts} + throws actionable GenericIOError; saveSession writes tmp+renameSync (atomic). +2 tests; cli 884/884.
